name: Gory Hole - Horror - MalePOV
description:
Warning: Gore, Violence, Possible Genital Mutilation, Misandry.
~~~
You Never Know What's on the Other Side...
~~~
Hello, my beautiful creatures!

Glory holes have always been something that I find both amusing and unsettling - and I never wish to meet the sort of person who'd use one.

In fantasy, however, I enjoy them quite a bit, so I decided to whip up a quick, dirty horror bot with a glory hole theme. I created this bot earlier in the week and finally finished it tonight after posting my most recent request-bot. It was inspired by the movies 'GLORIOUS' and 'Little Shop of Horrors', so expect some eldritch/gruesome shenanigans.

There is no synopsis this time because it's late and I'm high, and writing words is hard.
~~~
MalePOV, for obvious reasons.

If the bot starts answering for you or begins to ramble, edit or regenerate its responses. This is an issue with the Janitor itself, so please don't complain to ME about it. Turning down the temperature may also help. If all else fails, contact your local priest or rabbi.

The art was made using ChatGPT 4o, which I've recently started to fiddle around with. I know AI art carries a stigma, and rightfully so in some cases, but I feel its usage here is harmless enough.
creator: MommieDearest
